name: Hamburger Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the hamburger and drain thoroughly.
2. Add the chopped onion, carrots, celery, and cabbage to the skillet. Stir to combine.
3. Combine the tomato paste, Worcestershire sauce, and beef stock/bouillon in a separate bowl.
4. Pour the mixture from step 3 into the skillet with the vegetables and hamburger.
5. Transfer everything to the crock pot.
6. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours, or high setting for 3 to 4 hours.
NOTE:
This is an updated version of an old chuckwagon recipe. They would use finely diced beef and the vegetables and let them cook all day at roundup time.
